title: Applications for ICAP Fellowship Open
description: We're a fast-moving DoD organization contracting with commercial companies to solve national security problems
text:
Applications for the fiscal year 2026 ICAP Fellowship are now closed.
Today, DIU announced the opening of the application window for the Fiscal Year 2026 Immersive Commercial Acquisition Program (ICAP) Fellowship. As a partnership between the Defense Acquisition University (DAU) and DIU, the program equips acquisition professionals with the skills and experience needed to effectively acquire cutting-edge commercial technologies for the U.S. military.
Now entering its fourth year, the ICAP Fellowship offers a unique blend of virtual classroom training and hands-on experience. Fellows receive in-depth instruction on Other Transaction (OT) authority, a flexible contracting mechanism designed for rapid prototyping and procurement of commercial technologies. They also gain practical experience working on real-world DIU projects, applying their knowledge to current DOD needs.
“In today’s rapidly evolving technological landscape, the Department must be able to swiftly acquire and integrate leading-edge commercial technologies,” said DIU Director, Doug Beck. “To ensure our warfighters maintain a decisive advantage, we need contracting professionals who are fluent in both the defense and commercial sectors, and who can help their teammates across the Department to develop that same fluency. That is what the ICAP fellowship delivers, and we need to keep scaling it - and its impact - for the Department’s critical needs.”
The 12-month fellowship provides participants with:
